label: b3nd-hash
description: Content-addressed storage and link utilities for B3nd

symbols.name: computeSha256
symbols.signature: async function computeSha256(value: Uint8Array | unknown): Promise<string>
symbols.description: Compute SHA256 hash of a value. - Uint8Array: hashes raw bytes - Everything else: canonicalizes to RFC 8785 JSON, then hashes UTF-8 bytes

symbols.name: generateHashUri
symbols.description: Generate a content-addressed URI from a SHA256 hash

symbols.name: parseHashUri
symbols.description: Parse a hash:// URI to extract algorithm and digest

symbols.name: validateLinkValue
symbols.description: Validate that a value is a valid link (string URI)

symbols.name: generateLinkUri
symbols.signature: function generateLinkUri(pubkey: string, path: string): string
symbols.description: Generate a link URI for authenticated links

symbols.name: hashValidator
symbols.description: Schema validator factory for hash:// programs. Verifies that content matches the hash in the URI.

symbols.name: verifyHashContent
symbols.signature: async function verifyHashContent(uri: string, value: Uint8Array | unknown): Promise<unknown>
symbols.description: Verify that content matches its hash:// URI
